widget_battery	"﻿{""version"":""v0.9"",""createSurface"":{""surfaceId"":""battery-2x2-template"",""catalogId"":""ohos.a2ui.extended.catalog""}}
{""version"":""v0.9"",""updateComponents"":{""surfaceId"":""battery-2x2-template"",""components"":[{""id"":""root"",""component"":""Column"",""children"":[""headerRow"",""batteryMainRow"",""powerAction""],""styles"":{""width"":160,""height"":160,""padding"":12,""borderRadius"":18,""clip"":true,""justifyContent"":""spaceBetween"",""alignItems"":""center"",""linearGradient"":{""direction"":""RightBottom"",""colors"":[[""#2D47C8"",0],[""#0A8FEB"",0.58],[""#1547D7"",1]]}}},{""id"":""headerRow"",""component"":""Row"",""children"":[""chargeIcon"",""titleText""],""itemMargin"":10,""styles"":{""width"":""100%"",""height"":24,""justifyContent"":""start"",""alignItems"":""center""}},{""id"":""chargeIcon"",""component"":""Image"",""src"":{""path"":""/asset/chargeIcon""},""styles"":{""width"":24,""height"":24,""objectFit"":""contain""}},{""id"":""titleText"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/battery/title""},""styles"":{""fontSize"":14,""minFontSize"":12,""fontWeight"":600,""fontColor"":""#E6FFFFFF"",""maxLines"":1,""textAlign"":""start""}},{""id"":""batteryMainRow"",""component"":""Row"",""children"":[""batteryGauge"",""batteryTips""],""itemMargin"":10,""styles"":{""width"":""100%"",""height"":66,""justifyContent"":""start"",""alignItems"":""center""}},{""id"":""batteryGauge"",""component"":""Stack"",""children"":[""batteryTrack"",""batteryRing"",""percentText""],""styles"":{""width"":66,""height"":66,""alignContent"":""center""}},{""id"":""batteryTrack"",""component"":""Progress"",""value"":100,""total"":100,""styles"":{""type"":""ring"",""color"":""#5537D8FF"",""width"":66,""height"":66}},{""id"":""batteryRing"",""component"":""Progress"",""value"":{""path"":""/battery/percent""},""total"":{""path"":""/battery/total""},""styles"":{""type"":""ring"",""color"":""#FF4A5C"",""width"":66,""height"":66}},{""id"":""percentText"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""call"":""formatString"",""args"":{""value"":""${/battery/percent}%""}},""styles"":{""width"":66,""fontSize"":28,""minFontSize"":24,""fontWeight"":800,""fontColor"":""#FFFFFFFF"",""maxLines"":1,""textAlign"":""center""}},{""id"":""batteryTips"",""component"":""Column"",""children"":[""tipLine1"",""tipLine2"",""tipLine3"",""tipLine4""],""itemMargin"":2,""styles"":{""width"":60,""height"":58,""justifyContent"":""center"",""alignItems"":""start""}},{""id"":""tipLine1"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/battery/tip1""},""styles"":{""width"":60,""fontSize"":10,""fontWeight"":500,""fontColor"":""#CCFFFFFF"",""maxLines"":1,""textAlign"":""start""}},{""id"":""tipLine2"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/battery/tip2""},""styles"":{""width"":60,""fontSize"":10,""fontWeight"":500,""fontColor"":""#CCFFFFFF"",""maxLines"":1,""textAlign"":""start""}},{""id"":""tipLine3"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/battery/tip3""},""styles"":{""width"":60,""fontSize"":10,""fontWeight"":500,""fontColor"":""#CCFFFFFF"",""maxLines"":1,""textAlign"":""start""}},{""id"":""tipLine4"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/battery/tip4""},""styles"":{""width"":60,""fontSize"":10,""fontWeight"":500,""fontColor"":""#CCFFFFFF"",""maxLines"":1,""textAlign"":""start""}},{""id"":""powerAction"",""component"":""Row"",""children"":[""actionIcon"",""actionText""],""itemMargin"":8,""onClick"":[{""call"":""clickToDeeplink"",""args"":{""bundleName"":""com.huawei.hmos.settings"",""abilityName"":""com.huawei.hmos.settings.MainAbility"",""uri"":""intelligent_scene_entry""}}],""styles"":{""width"":""100%"",""height"":36,""padding"":{""left"":16,""right"":16},""borderRadius"":18,""justifyContent"":""center"",""alignItems"":""center"",""backgroundColor"":""#330C63FF"",""borderWidth"":1,""borderColor"":""#55FFFFFF""}},{""id"":""actionIcon"",""component"":""Image"",""src"":{""path"":""/asset/savePowerIcon""},""styles"":{""width"":18,""height"":18,""objectFit"":""contain""}},{""id"":""actionText"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/action/label""},""styles"":{""width"":66,""fontSize"":14,""minFontSize"":13,""fontWeight"":600,""fontColor"":""#FFFFFFFF"",""maxLines"":1,""textAlign"":""center""}}]}}
{""version"":""v0.9"",""updateDataModel"":{""surfaceId"":""battery-2x2-template"",""path"":""/"",""value"":{""asset"":{""chargeIcon"":""resources/base/media/icon_charge.png"",""savePowerIcon"":""resources/base/media/icon_save_power.png""},""battery"":{""title"":""电量低"",""percent"":18,""total"":100,""percentLabel"":""18%"",""tip1"":""手机电量"",""tip2"":""低于20%，"",""tip3"":""建议开启"",""tip4"":""省电模式""},""action"":{""label"":""省电模式"",""targetId"":""power-saving""}}}}"
widget_care	"{""version"":""v0.9"",""createSurface"":{""surfaceId"":""ui_surface"",""catalogId"":""ohos.a2ui.extended.catalog""}}
{""version"":""v0.9"",""updateComponents"":{""surfaceId"":""ui_surface"",""components"":[{""id"":""root"",""component"":""Stack"",""children"":[""weather_background"",""weather_content""],""styles"":{""width"":160,""height"":160,""borderRadius"":16,""clip"":true}},{""id"":""weather_background"",""component"":""Image"",""src"":""data:image/png;base64,"",""fit"":""cover"",""styles"":{""width"":""matchParent"",""height"":""matchParent"",""borderRadius"":16,""clip"":true}},{""id"":""weather_content"",""component"":""Column"",""children"":[""weather_top_row"",""weather_bottom_row""],""styles"":{""width"":""matchParent"",""height"":""matchParent"",""space"":0}}]}}
{""version"":""v0.9"",""updateComponents"":{""surfaceId"":""ui_surface"",""components"":[{""id"":""weather_top_row"",""component"":""Row"",""children"":[""weather_top_left"",""weather_top_right""],""styles"":{""width"":""matchParent"",""layoutWeight"":1}},{""id"":""weather_bottom_row"",""component"":""Row"",""children"":[""weather_bottom_left"",""weather_bottom_right""],""styles"":{""width"":""matchParent"",""layoutWeight"":1}}]}}
{""version"":""v0.9"",""updateComponents"":{""surfaceId"":""ui_surface"",""components"":[{""id"":""weather_top_left"",""component"":""Column"",""children"":[""weather_temp"",""weather_warning""],""styles"":{""height"":""matchParent"",""layoutWeight"":1,""space"":4,""justifyContent"":""start"",""alignItems"":""start"",""padding"":{""top"":15,""right"":0,""bottom"":8,""left"":14}}},{""id"":""weather_top_right"",""component"":""Column"",""children"":[""weather_cloud"",""weather_city""],""styles"":{""height"":""matchParent"",""layoutWeight"":1,""space"":0,""justifyContent"":""start"",""alignItems"":""right"",""padding"":{""top"":10,""right"":14,""bottom"":8,""left"":8}}}]}}
{""version"":""v0.9"",""updateComponents"":{""surfaceId"":""ui_surface"",""components"":[{""id"":""weather_bottom_left"",""component"":""Column"",""children"":[""cold_card""],""styles"":{""height"":""matchParent"",""layoutWeight"":1,""justifyContent"":""end"",""alignItems"":""start"",""padding"":{""top"":8,""right"":8,""bottom"":14,""left"":14}}},{""id"":""weather_bottom_right"",""component"":""Column"",""children"":[""call_stack""],""styles"":{""height"":""matchParent"",""layoutWeight"":1,""justifyContent"":""end"",""alignItems"":""right"",""padding"":{""top"":8,""right"":14,""bottom"":18,""left"":8}}}]}}
{""version"":""v0.9"",""updateComponents"":{""surfaceId"":""ui_surface"",""components"":[{""id"":""weather_temp"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":""31°"",""styles"":{""fontSize"":40,""fontWeight"":""800"",""fontColor"":""#FFFFFFFF"",""maxLines"":1,""flexShrink"":0}},{""id"":""weather_warning"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":""🌡️ 高温预警"",""styles"":{""fontSize"":9,""fontWeight"":""700"",""fontColor"":""#FFFFE46B"",""maxLines"":1,""flexShrink"":0}}]}}
{""version"":""v0.9"",""updateComponents"":{""surfaceId"":""ui_surface"",""components"":[{""id"":""weather_cloud"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":""🌥️"",""styles"":{""fontSize"":46,""fontWeight"":""700"",""fontColor"":""#FFFFFFFF"",""textAlign"":""right"",""maxLines"":1,""flexShrink"":0}},{""id"":""weather_city"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":""Shenzhen"",""styles"":{""fontSize"":12,""fontWeight"":""600"",""fontColor"":""#FFFFFFFF"",""textAlign"":""right"",""maxLines"":1,""flexShrink"":0}}]}}
{""version"":""v0.9"",""updateComponents"":{""surfaceId"":""ui_surface"",""components"":[{""id"":""cold_card"",""component"":""Column"",""children"":[""cold_label"",""cold_value""],""styles"":{""width"":74,""height"":58,""space"":3,""justifyContent"":""center"",""alignItems"":""start"",""backgroundColor"":""#26FFFFFF"",""borderColor"":""#33FFFFFF"",""borderWidth"":1,""borderRadius"":16,""padding"":{""top"":8,""right"":6,""bottom"":8,""left"":6},""clip"":true}},{""id"":""cold_label"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":""😷 感冒指数"",""styles"":{""width"": ""matchParent"", ""textAlign"": ""center"", ""fontSize"":9,""fontWeight"":""600"",""fontColor"":""#FFFFFFFF"",""maxLines"":1}},{""id"":""cold_value"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":""易发"",""styles"":{""width"": ""matchParent"",""fontSize"":18,""fontWeight"":""700"",""fontColor"":""#FFFFFFFF"",""textAlign"": ""center"",""maxLines"":1}}]}}
{""version"":""v0.9"",""updateComponents"":{""surfaceId"":""ui_surface"",""components"":[{""id"":""call_stack"",""component"":""Stack"",""children"":[""call_image"",""call_button""],""styles"":{""width"":48,""height"":48,""alignContent"":""center"",""clip"":true}},{""id"":""call_image"",""component"":""Image"",""src"":""resources/call_button.svg"",""styles"":{""width"":48,""height"":48,""clip"":true}},{""id"":""call_button"",""component"":""Button"",""label"":"" "",""styles"":{""width"":48,""height"":48,""backgroundColor"":""#00000000"",""borderWidth"":0,""borderRadius"":24,""fontColor"":""#00000000"",""margin"":0},""accessibility"":{""label"":""拨打电话""},""action"":{""functionCall"":{""call"":""demo.callPhone""}}}]}}"
widget_earbuds	"{""version"":""v0.9"",""createSurface"":{""surfaceId"":""freeclip2-status-card"",""catalogId"":""ohos.a2ui.extended.catalog""}}
{""version"":""v0.9"",""updateComponents"":{""surfaceId"":""freeclip2-status-card"",""components"":[{""id"":""root"",""component"":""Stack"",""children"":[""cardBgImage"",""bgScrim"",""contentLayer""],""accessibility"":{""label"":""Free Clip 2 状态卡片"",""description"":""查看耳机电量和音乐入口""},""styles"":{""width"":160,""height"":160,""borderRadius"":18,""clip"":true,""backgroundColor"":""#F8FAFF"",""alignContent"":""topStart"",""shadow"":{""radius"":18,""color"":""#22091D4B"",""offsetX"":0,""offsetY"":8}}},{""id"":""cardBgImage"",""component"":""Image"",""src"":{""path"":""/asset/productImage""},""styles"":{""width"":160,""height"":160,""objectFit"":""contain""}},{""id"":""bgScrim"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":"""",""styles"":{""width"":160,""height"":160,""backgroundColor"":""#66FFFFFF""}},{""id"":""contentLayer"",""component"":""Column"",""children"":[""topStack"",""statsRow""],""itemMargin"":6,""styles"":{""width"":160,""height"":160,""padding"":{""top"":12,""right"":12,""bottom"":12,""left"":12},""justifyContent"":""start"",""alignItems"":""start""}},{""id"":""topStack"",""component"":""Stack"",""children"":[""deviceInfo""],""styles"":{""width"":136,""height"":80,""clip"":false,""alignContent"":""topStart""}},{""id"":""deviceInfo"",""component"":""Column"",""children"":[""deviceName"",""batteryBlock""],""itemMargin"":6,""styles"":{""width"":104,""height"":72,""margin"":{""top"":2,""left"":0},""justifyContent"":""start"",""alignItems"":""start""}},{""id"":""deviceName"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/device/name""},""styles"":{""width"":104,""fontSize"":18,""minFontSize"":14,""fontWeight"":800,""fontColor"":""#263044"",""maxLines"":1,""textOverflow"":""none""}},{""id"":""batteryBlock"",""component"":""Column"",""children"":[""earbudBatteryRow"",""caseBatteryRow""],""itemMargin"":4,""styles"":{""width"":62,""height"":32,""margin"":{""left"":2},""justifyContent"":""start"",""alignItems"":""start""}},{""id"":""earbudBatteryRow"",""component"":""Row"",""children"":[""earbudDot"",""earbudBatteryText""],""itemMargin"":4,""styles"":{""width"":62,""height"":14,""justifyContent"":""start"",""alignItems"":""center""}},{""id"":""earbudDot"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":"""",""styles"":{""width"":8,""height"":8,""borderRadius"":4,""backgroundColor"":""#CCD5FF""}},{""id"":""earbudBatteryText"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/battery/earbudsLabel""},""styles"":{""width"":50,""fontSize"":12,""minFontSize"":11,""fontWeight"":700,""fontColor"":""#5F6B82"",""maxLines"":1,""textOverflow"":""none""}},{""id"":""caseBatteryRow"",""component"":""Row"",""children"":[""caseDot"",""caseBatteryText""],""itemMargin"":4,""styles"":{""width"":62,""height"":14,""justifyContent"":""start"",""alignItems"":""center""}},{""id"":""caseDot"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":"""",""styles"":{""width"":8,""height"":8,""borderRadius"":4,""backgroundColor"":""#DDE3FF""}},{""id"":""caseBatteryText"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/battery/caseLabel""},""styles"":{""width"":50,""fontSize"":12,""minFontSize"":11,""fontWeight"":700,""fontColor"":""#5F6B82"",""maxLines"":1,""textOverflow"":""none""}},{""id"":""statsRow"",""component"":""Row"",""children"":[""dailyPane"",""likedPane""],""itemMargin"":4,""styles"":{""width"":136,""height"":50,""justifyContent"":""start"",""alignItems"":""center""}},{""id"":""dailyPane"",""component"":""Column"",""children"":[""dailyIcon"",""dailyLabel"",""dailyValue""],""itemMargin"":1,""styles"":{""width"":66,""height"":50,""borderRadius"":16,""backgroundColor"":""#E6ECF3FF"",""borderWidth"":1,""borderColor"":""#EEDDE8FF"",""justifyContent"":""center"",""alignItems"":""center""}},{""id"":""dailyIcon"",""component"":""Image"",""src"":{""path"":""/music/daily/icon""},""styles"":{""width"":16,""height"":16,""objectFit"":""contain""}},{""id"":""dailyLabel"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/music/daily/label""},""styles"":{""width"":58,""fontSize"":12,""minFontSize"":11,""fontWeight"":700,""fontColor"":""#37415A"",""maxLines"":1,""textOverflow"":""none"",""textAlign"":""center""}},{""id"":""dailyValue"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/music/daily/value""},""styles"":{""width"":58,""fontSize"":14,""minFontSize"":12,""fontWeight"":800,""fontColor"":""#263044"",""maxLines"":1,""textOverflow"":""none"",""textAlign"":""center""}},{""id"":""likedPane"",""component"":""Column"",""children"":[""likedIcon"",""likedLabel"",""likedValue""],""itemMargin"":1,""styles"":{""width"":66,""height"":50,""borderRadius"":16,""backgroundColor"":""#E6F3F1F7"",""borderWidth"":1,""borderColor"":""#EEE8E3F1"",""justifyContent"":""center"",""alignItems"":""center""}},{""id"":""likedIcon"",""component"":""Image"",""src"":{""path"":""/music/liked/icon""},""styles"":{""width"":16,""height"":16,""objectFit"":""contain""}},{""id"":""likedLabel"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/music/liked/label""},""styles"":{""width"":58,""fontSize"":12,""minFontSize"":11,""fontWeight"":700,""fontColor"":""#37415A"",""maxLines"":1,""textOverflow"":""none"",""textAlign"":""center""}},{""id"":""likedValue"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/music/liked/value""},""styles"":{""width"":58,""fontSize"":14,""minFontSize"":12,""fontWeight"":800,""fontColor"":""#263044"",""maxLines"":1,""textOverflow"":""none"",""textAlign"":""center""}}]}}
{""version"":""v0.9"",""updateDataModel"":{""surfaceId"":""freeclip2-status-card"",""path"":""/"",""value"":{""device"":{""id"":""freeclip2-demo"",""name"":""Free Clip 2"",""status"":""已连接""},""battery"":{""earbudsLabel"":""47%"",""caseLabel"":""99%""},""asset"":{""productImage"":""resources/base/media/icon_earphone.png""},""music"":{""daily"":{""icon"":""resources/base/media/icon_music.png"",""label"":""每日"",""value"":""30首""},""liked"":{""icon"":""resources/base/media/icon_like.png"",""label"":""心动"",""value"":""歌单""}}}}}"
widget_focus	"{""version"":""v0.9"",""createSurface"":{""surfaceId"":""meeting-focus-card"",""catalogId"":""ohos.a2ui.extended.catalog""}}
{""version"":""v0.9"",""updateComponents"":{""surfaceId"":""meeting-focus-card"",""components"":[{""id"":""root"",""component"":""Column"",""children"":[""scheduleHeader"",""meetingTitle"",""meetingTime"",""meetingAlert"",""focusPill""],""itemMargin"":2,""styles"":{""width"":160,""height"":160,""padding"":12,""borderRadius"":18,""clip"":true,""justifyContent"":""spaceBetween"",""alignItems"":""center"",""linearGradient"":{""direction"":""RightBottom"",""colors"":[[""#4B2F22"",0],[""#7A5137"",0.52],[""#C08A5A"",1]]},""shadow"":{""radius"":16,""color"":""#33251610"",""offsetX"":0,""offsetY"":6,""fill"":false,""type"":""color"",""style"":""outer""}}},{""id"":""scheduleHeader"",""component"":""Row"",""children"":[""calendarIcon"",""scheduleLabel""],""itemMargin"":6,""styles"":{""width"":136,""height"":20,""justifyContent"":""start"",""alignItems"":""center""}},{""id"":""calendarIcon"",""component"":""Image"",""src"":{""path"":""/asset/meetingIcon""},""styles"":{""width"":18,""height"":18,""objectFit"":""contain""}},{""id"":""scheduleLabel"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/meeting/scheduleLabel""},""styles"":{""width"":112,""height"":18,""fontSize"":12,""fontWeight"":600,""fontColor"":""#F6E7D8EE"",""maxLines"":1,""minFontSize"":11,""textOverflow"":""none""}},{""id"":""meetingTitle"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/meeting/title""},""styles"":{""width"":136,""height"":24,""fontSize"":15,""fontWeight"":800,""fontColor"":""#FFFFFFFF"",""maxLines"":1,""minFontSize"":13,""textOverflow"":""none"",""textAlign"":""center""}},{""id"":""meetingTime"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/meeting/timeRange""},""styles"":{""width"":136,""height"":31,""fontSize"":21,""fontWeight"":900,""fontColor"":""#FFFFFFFF"",""maxLines"":1,""minFontSize"":18,""textOverflow"":""none"",""textAlign"":""center""}},{""id"":""meetingAlert"",""component"":""Row"",""children"":[""alertIcon"",""alertText""],""itemMargin"":5,""styles"":{""width"":136,""height"":20,""justifyContent"":""start"",""alignItems"":""center""}},{""id"":""alertIcon"",""component"":""Image"",""src"":{""path"":""/asset/timeIcon""},""styles"":{""width"":14,""height"":14,""objectFit"":""contain""}},{""id"":""alertText"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/meeting/alertText""},""styles"":{""width"":117,""height"":18,""fontSize"":12,""fontWeight"":700,""fontColor"":""#FFE8A3"",""maxLines"":1,""minFontSize"":10,""textOverflow"":""none""}},{""id"":""focusPill"",""component"":""Stack"",""children"":[""focusContent""],""onClick"":[{""call"":""clickToDeeplink"",""args"":{""bundleName"":""com.huawei.hmos.settings"",""abilityName"":""com.huawei.hmos.settings.MainAbility"",""uri"":""intelligent_scene_entry""}}],""accessibility"":{""label"":""打开专注模式""},""styles"":{""width"":136,""height"":32,""padding"":4,""borderRadius"":16,""backgroundColor"":""#24FFFFFF"",""borderWidth"":1,""borderColor"":""#70FFFFFF"",""alignContent"":""center""}},{""id"":""focusContent"",""component"":""Row"",""children"":[""focusIcon"",""focusLabel""],""itemMargin"":6,""styles"":{""width"":104,""height"":22,""justifyContent"":""center"",""alignItems"":""center""}},{""id"":""focusIcon"",""component"":""Image"",""src"":{""path"":""/asset/focusIcon""},""styles"":{""width"":16,""height"":16,""objectFit"":""contain""}},{""id"":""focusLabel"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/action/label""},""styles"":{""width"":82,""height"":20,""fontSize"":14,""fontWeight"":700,""fontColor"":""#FFFFFFFF"",""maxLines"":1,""minFontSize"":12,""textOverflow"":""none"",""textAlign"":""start""}}]}}
{""version"":""v0.9"",""updateDataModel"":{""surfaceId"":""meeting-focus-card"",""path"":""/"",""value"":{""meeting"":{""id"":""meeting-agent-review-demo"",""scheduleLabel"":""下一个日程"",""title"":""Agent需求评审会"",""timeRange"":""14:00-15:30"",""alertText"":""距离会议还有17分""},""asset"":{""meetingIcon"":""resources/base/media/icon_meeting.png"",""timeIcon"":""resources/base/media/icon_time.png"",""focusIcon"":""resources/base/media/icon_focus.png""},""action"":{""label"":""专注模式""}}}}"
widget_marathon	"{""version"":""v0.9"",""createSurface"":{""surfaceId"":""marathon-countdown-card"",""catalogId"":""ohos.a2ui.extended.catalog""}}
{""version"":""v0.9"",""updateComponents"":{""surfaceId"":""marathon-countdown-card"",""components"":[{""id"":""root"",""component"":""Column"",""children"":[""header"",""countdown"",""trainingPanel""],""itemMargin"":8,""styles"":{""width"":160,""height"":160,""padding"":10,""borderRadius"":24,""clip"":true,""backgroundColor"":""#191D2B"",""linearGradient"":{""direction"":""RightBottom"",""colors"":[[""#1B202D"",0],[""#2636A8"",0.58],[""#765BFF"",1]]},""shadow"":{""radius"":18,""color"":""#553654FF"",""offsetX"":0,""offsetY"":6,""fill"":false,""type"":""color"",""style"":""outer""}}},{""id"":""header"",""component"":""Row"",""children"":[""calendarMark"",""eventTitle""],""itemMargin"":5,""wrap"":""noWrap"",""styles"":{""width"":""100%"",""height"":17,""justifyContent"":""start"",""alignItems"":""center""}},{""id"":""calendarMark"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/event/icon""},""styles"":{""width"":17,""height"":17,""borderRadius"":5,""backgroundColor"":""#26FFFFFF"",""fontSize"":12,""fontWeight"":800,""fontColor"":""#EEF3FF"",""textAlign"":""center"",""maxLines"":1}},{""id"":""eventTitle"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/event/title""},""styles"":{""layoutWeight"":1,""fontSize"":10,""minFontSize"":9,""fontWeight"":600,""fontColor"":""#DCE3FF"",""maxLines"":1,""wordBreak"":""normal""}},{""id"":""countdown"",""component"":""Row"",""children"":[""digitTenBox"",""digitOneBox"",""dayUnitBox""],""itemMargin"":6,""wrap"":""noWrap"",""styles"":{""width"":""100%"",""height"":58,""justifyContent"":""start"",""alignItems"":""center""}},{""id"":""digitTenBox"",""component"":""Column"",""children"":[""digitTen""],""styles"":{""width"":42,""height"":58,""borderRadius"":15,""backgroundColor"":""#00FFFFFF"",""linearGradient"":{""direction"":""RightBottom"",""colors"":[[""#54FFFFFF"",0],[""#24EFF2FF"",1]]},""borderWidth"":1,""borderColor"":""#5CFFFFFF"",""justifyContent"":""center"",""alignItems"":""center"",""shadow"":{""radius"":12,""color"":""#10000000"",""offsetX"":0,""offsetY"":4,""fill"":false,""type"":""color"",""style"":""outer""}}},{""id"":""digitTen"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/event/daysTens""},""styles"":{""fontSize"":46,""minFontSize"":42,""fontWeight"":900,""fontColor"":""#F8FBFF"",""maxLines"":1,""textAlign"":""center""}},{""id"":""digitOneBox"",""component"":""Column"",""children"":[""digitOne""],""styles"":{""width"":44,""height"":58,""borderRadius"":15,""backgroundColor"":""#00FFFFFF"",""linearGradient"":{""direction"":""RightBottom"",""colors"":[[""#5AFFFFFF"",0],[""#28EFF2FF"",1]]},""borderWidth"":1,""borderColor"":""#62FFFFFF"",""justifyContent"":""center"",""alignItems"":""center"",""shadow"":{""radius"":14,""color"":""#10000000"",""offsetX"":0,""offsetY"":4,""fill"":false,""type"":""color"",""style"":""outer""}}},{""id"":""digitOne"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/event/daysOnes""},""styles"":{""fontSize"":46,""minFontSize"":42,""fontWeight"":900,""fontColor"":""#F8FBFF"",""maxLines"":1,""textAlign"":""center""}},{""id"":""dayUnitBox"",""component"":""Column"",""children"":[""dayUnit""],""styles"":{""width"":18,""height"":58,""justifyContent"":""end"",""alignItems"":""center""}},{""id"":""dayUnit"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/event/unit""},""styles"":{""fontSize"":15,""minFontSize"":13,""fontWeight"":600,""fontColor"":""#DDE3FF"",""maxLines"":1,""textAlign"":""center""}},{""id"":""trainingPanel"",""component"":""Row"",""children"":[""runnerGlyph"",""trainingTexts""],""itemMargin"":7,""wrap"":""noWrap"",""styles"":{""width"":""100%"",""height"":44,""padding"":6,""borderRadius"":17,""backgroundColor"":""#28FFFFFF"",""linearGradient"":{""direction"":""RightBottom"",""colors"":[[""#364CFF"",0],[""#8156FF"",1]]},""borderWidth"":1,""borderColor"":""#55FFFFFF"",""justifyContent"":""start"",""alignItems"":""center""}},{""id"":""runnerGlyph"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/training/icon""},""styles"":{""width"":24,""height"":28,""fontSize"":22,""fontWeight"":900,""fontColor"":""#F2F6FF"",""maxLines"":1,""textAlign"":""center""}},{""id"":""trainingTexts"",""component"":""Column"",""children"":[""trainingLabel"",""trainingValue""],""itemMargin"":1,""styles"":{""layoutWeight"":1,""height"":""100%"",""justifyContent"":""center"",""alignItems"":""start""}},{""id"":""trainingLabel"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/training/label""},""styles"":{""fontSize"":10,""minFontSize"":9,""fontWeight"":600,""fontColor"":""#CAD7FF"",""maxLines"":1}},{""id"":""trainingValue"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/training/value""},""styles"":{""fontSize"":14,""minFontSize"":12,""fontWeight"":800,""fontColor"":""#FFFFFF"",""maxLines"":1}}]}}
{""version"":""v0.9"",""updateDataModel"":{""surfaceId"":""marathon-countdown-card"",""path"":""/"",""value"":{""event"":{""icon"":""▦"",""title"":""距离大湾区城市马拉松"",""daysTens"":""3"",""daysOnes"":""2"",""unit"":""天""},""training"":{""icon"":""🏃"",""label"":""今日训练计划"",""value"":""8km配速慢跑""}}}}"
widget_meeting	"{""version"":""v0.9"",""createSurface"":{""surfaceId"":""meeting-2x2-template"",""catalogId"":""ohos.a2ui.extended.catalog""}}
{""version"":""v0.9"",""updateComponents"":{""surfaceId"":""meeting-2x2-template"",""components"":[{""id"":""root"",""component"":""Column"",""children"":[""headerRow"",""meetingInfo"",""bottomRow""],""styles"":{""width"":160,""height"":160,""padding"":12,""borderRadius"":18,""clip"":true,""justifyContent"":""spaceBetween"",""alignItems"":""center"",""backgroundColor"":""#F7F9F6""}},{""id"":""headerRow"",""component"":""Row"",""children"":[""meetingIcon"",""headerTitle""],""itemMargin"":8,""styles"":{""width"":""100%"",""height"":28,""justifyContent"":""center"",""alignItems"":""center""}},{""id"":""meetingIcon"",""component"":""Image"",""src"":{""path"":""/asset/meetingIcon""},""styles"":{""width"":20,""height"":20,""objectFit"":""contain""}},{""id"":""headerTitle"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/meeting/header""},""styles"":{""width"":86,""fontSize"":18,""minFontSize"":16,""fontWeight"":600,""fontColor"":""#6C6256"",""maxLines"":1,""textAlign"":""start""}},{""id"":""meetingInfo"",""component"":""Column"",""children"":[""meetingTitle"",""timeRow"",""roomRow""],""itemMargin"":5,""styles"":{""width"":""100%"",""height"":58,""justifyContent"":""center"",""alignItems"":""start""}},{""id"":""meetingTitle"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/meeting/title""},""styles"":{""width"":""100%"",""fontSize"":16,""minFontSize"":14,""fontWeight"":600,""fontColor"":""#6C6256"",""maxLines"":1,""textAlign"":""start""}},{""id"":""timeRow"",""component"":""Row"",""children"":[""timeIcon"",""timeText""],""itemMargin"":7,""styles"":{""width"":""100%"",""height"":14,""justifyContent"":""start"",""alignItems"":""center""}},{""id"":""timeIcon"",""component"":""Image"",""src"":{""path"":""/asset/timeIcon""},""styles"":{""width"":13,""height"":13,""objectFit"":""contain""}},{""id"":""timeText"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/meeting/time""},""styles"":{""width"":106,""fontSize"":12,""minFontSize"":10,""fontWeight"":400,""fontColor"":""#998F80"",""maxLines"":1,""textAlign"":""start""}},{""id"":""roomRow"",""component"":""Row"",""children"":[""roomIcon"",""roomText""],""itemMargin"":7,""styles"":{""width"":""100%"",""height"":14,""justifyContent"":""start"",""alignItems"":""center""}},{""id"":""roomIcon"",""component"":""Image"",""src"":{""path"":""/asset/idIcon""},""styles"":{""width"":13,""height"":13,""objectFit"":""contain""}},{""id"":""roomText"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/meeting/room""},""styles"":{""width"":106,""fontSize"":12,""minFontSize"":10,""fontWeight"":400,""fontColor"":""#998F80"",""maxLines"":1,""textAlign"":""start""}},{""id"":""bottomRow"",""component"":""Row"",""children"":[""joinButton"",""dateBlock""],""styles"":{""width"":""100%"",""height"":38,""justifyContent"":""spaceBetween"",""alignItems"":""center""}},{""id"":""joinButton"",""component"":""Button"",""label"":{""path"":""/action/label""},""onClick"":[{""call"":""clickToIntent"",""args"":{""intentName"":""ViewCalendarEvent"",""params"":{""entityId"":{""path"":""/meeting/entityId""}}}}],""styles"":{""width"":84,""height"":36,""borderRadius"":18,""backgroundColor"":""#22282D"",""fontSize"":14,""minFontSize"":13,""fontWeight"":600,""fontColor"":""#FFFFFFFF""}},{""id"":""dateBlock"",""component"":""Stack"",""children"":[""dateWatermark"",""dateText""],""styles"":{""width"":44,""height"":38,""alignContent"":""center"",""backgroundColor"":""#55FFFFFF"",""borderRadius"":14,""clip"":true}},{""id"":""dateWatermark"",""component"":""Image"",""src"":{""path"":""/asset/watermarkIcon""},""styles"":{""width"":38,""height"":38,""objectFit"":""contain""}},{""id"":""dateText"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/meeting/date""},""styles"":{""width"":44,""fontSize"":20,""minFontSize"":18,""fontWeight"":600,""fontColor"":""#B6AA93"",""maxLines"":1,""textAlign"":""center""}}]}}
{""version"":""v0.9"",""updateDataModel"":{""surfaceId"":""meeting-2x2-template"",""path"":""/"",""value"":{""asset"":{""meetingIcon"":""resources/base/media/icon_meeting.png"",""timeIcon"":""resources/base/media/icon_time.png"",""idIcon"":""resources/base/media/icon_id.png"",""watermarkIcon"":""resources/base/media/icon_watermark.png""},""meeting"":{""header"":""今日会议"",""title"":""项目阶段性汇报"",""time"":""10:40-11:30 AM"",""room"":""97会议室"",""date"":""28"",""entityId"":""meeting-today-001""},""action"":{""label"":""加入会议""}}}}"
widget_sleep	"{""version"":""v0.9"",""createSurface"":{""surfaceId"":""sleep-status-card"",""catalogId"":""ohos.a2ui.extended.catalog""}}
{""version"":""v0.9"",""updateComponents"":{""surfaceId"":""sleep-status-card"",""components"":[{""id"":""root"",""component"":""Column"",""children"":[""headerRow"",""mainRow"",""reminderPill""],""itemMargin"":6,""styles"":{""width"":160,""height"":160,""padding"":10,""borderRadius"":24,""clip"":true,""justifyContent"":""spaceBetween"",""alignItems"":""center"",""linearGradient"":{""direction"":""RightBottom"",""colors"":[[""#17104E"",0],[""#25148C"",0.44],[""#4B22E8"",0.78],[""#651DFF"",1]]},""shadow"":{""radius"":18,""color"":""#442B18FF"",""offsetX"":0,""offsetY"":7,""fill"":false,""type"":""color"",""style"":""outer""}}},{""id"":""headerRow"",""component"":""Row"",""children"":[""statusGlyph"",""statusTitle""],""itemMargin"":7,""wrap"":""noWrap"",""styles"":{""width"":140,""height"":18,""justifyContent"":""start"",""alignItems"":""center""}},{""id"":""statusGlyph"",""component"":""Image"",""styles"":{""width"":16,""height"":16,""objectFit"":""contain""},""src"":{""path"":""/asset/statusIcon""}},{""id"":""statusTitle"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/sleep/statusTitle""},""styles"":{""width"":112,""height"":18,""fontSize"":15,""fontWeight"":600,""fontColor"":""#E8E0FF"",""maxLines"":1,""minFontSize"":12,""textOverflow"":""none""}},{""id"":""mainRow"",""component"":""Row"",""children"":[""sleepVisual"",""metricColumn""],""itemMargin"":6,""wrap"":""noWrap"",""styles"":{""width"":140,""height"":76,""justifyContent"":""start"",""alignItems"":""center""}},{""id"":""sleepVisual"",""component"":""Stack"",""children"":[""sleepProgress"",""moonGlyph""],""styles"":{""width"":74,""height"":74,""borderRadius"":37,""alignContent"":""center""}},{""id"":""sleepProgress"",""component"":""Progress"",""value"":{""path"":""/sleep/progressValue""},""total"":{""path"":""/sleep/progressTotal""},""styles"":{""width"":72,""height"":72,""type"":""ring"",""color"":""#9A80FF""}},{""id"":""moonGlyph"",""component"":""Image"",""styles"":{""width"":55,""height"":55,""objectFit"":""contain""},""src"":{""path"":""/asset/moonIcon""}},{""id"":""metricColumn"",""component"":""Column"",""children"":[""hourMetric"",""minuteMetric""],""itemMargin"":0,""styles"":{""width"":60,""height"":74,""justifyContent"":""center"",""alignItems"":""start""}},{""id"":""hourMetric"",""component"":""Row"",""children"":[""hourValue"",""hourUnit""],""itemMargin"":4,""wrap"":""noWrap"",""styles"":{""width"":60,""height"":34,""justifyContent"":""start"",""alignItems"":""bottom""}},{""id"":""hourValue"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/sleep/hourValue""},""styles"":{""width"":20,""height"":34,""fontSize"":31,""fontWeight"":800,""fontColor"":""#FFFFFF"",""maxLines"":1,""minFontSize"":26,""textOverflow"":""none""}},{""id"":""hourUnit"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/sleep/hourUnit""},""styles"":{""width"":34,""height"":22,""fontSize"":14,""fontWeight"":700,""fontColor"":""#F4EEFF"",""maxLines"":1,""minFontSize"":11,""textOverflow"":""none""}},{""id"":""minuteMetric"",""component"":""Row"",""children"":[""minuteValue"",""minuteUnit""],""itemMargin"":3,""wrap"":""noWrap"",""styles"":{""width"":60,""height"":34,""justifyContent"":""start"",""alignItems"":""bottom""}},{""id"":""minuteValue"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/sleep/minuteValue""},""styles"":{""width"":38,""height"":34,""fontSize"":30,""fontWeight"":800,""fontColor"":""#FFFFFF"",""maxLines"":1,""minFontSize"":25,""textOverflow"":""none""}},{""id"":""minuteUnit"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/sleep/minuteUnit""},""styles"":{""width"":17,""height"":21,""fontSize"":14,""fontWeight"":700,""fontColor"":""#F4EEFF"",""maxLines"":1,""minFontSize"":11,""textOverflow"":""none""}},{""id"":""reminderPill"",""component"":""Row"",""children"":[""reminderIcon"",""reminderLabel""],""itemMargin"":6,""wrap"":""noWrap"",""onClick"":[{""call"":""setEarlySleepReminder"",""args"":{""reminderId"":{""path"":""/action/reminderId""},""targetBedtime"":{""path"":""/action/targetBedtime""}}}],""styles"":{""width"":140,""height"":30,""padding"":4,""borderRadius"":15,""backgroundColor"":""#35FFFFFF"",""borderWidth"":1,""borderColor"":""#55FFFFFF"",""justifyContent"":""center"",""alignItems"":""center"",""shadow"":{""radius"":10,""color"":""#33270DFF"",""offsetX"":0,""offsetY"":3,""fill"":false,""type"":""color"",""style"":""outer""}}},{""id"":""reminderIcon"",""component"":""Image"",""styles"":{""width"":20,""height"":20,""objectFit"":""contain""},""src"":{""path"":""/asset/reminderIcon""}},{""id"":""reminderLabel"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/action/label""},""styles"":{""width"":94,""height"":18,""fontSize"":15,""fontWeight"":700,""fontColor"":""#FFFFFF"",""maxLines"":1,""minFontSize"":12,""textOverflow"":""none"",""textAlign"":""start""}}]}}
{""version"":""v0.9"",""updateDataModel"":{""surfaceId"":""sleep-status-card"",""path"":""/"",""value"":{""sleep"":{""statusTitle"":""睡眠不足"",""progressValue"":6.75,""progressTotal"":8,""hourValue"":""6"",""hourUnit"":""小时"",""minuteValue"":""45"",""minuteUnit"":""分""},""action"":{""label"":""设定早睡提醒"",""reminderId"":""sleep-reminder-demo"",""targetBedtime"":""22:30""},""asset"":{""statusIcon"":""resources/base/media/icon_alarm_clock1.png"",""moonIcon"":""resources/base/media/icon_sleep.png"",""reminderIcon"":""resources/base/media/icon_remind.png""}}}}"

{""version"":""v0.9"",""updateComponents"":{""surfaceId"":""status-2x2-template"",""components"":[{""id"":""root"",""component"":""Column"",""children"":[""topStatusRow"",""mainStatusRow"",""actionPill""],""styles"":{""width"":160,""height"":160,""padding"":12,""borderRadius"":18,""clip"":true,""justifyContent"":""spaceBetween"",""alignItems"":""center"",""linearGradient"":{""direction"":""RightBottom"",""colors"":[[""#073543"",0],[""#4F987C"",0.52],[""#0B3945"",1]]}}},{""id"":""topStatusRow"",""component"":""Row"",""children"":[""batteryMeter"",""earphoneMeter"",""phoneMeter""],""styles"":{""width"":""100%"",""height"":36,""justifyContent"":""spaceBetween"",""alignItems"":""center""}},{""id"":""batteryMeter"",""component"":""Stack"",""children"":[""batteryRing"",""batteryIcon""],""styles"":{""width"":36,""height"":36,""alignContent"":""center""}},{""id"":""batteryRing"",""component"":""Progress"",""value"":{""path"":""/status/battery/value""},""total"":{""path"":""/status/battery/total""},""styles"":{""type"":""ring"",""color"":""#35F058"",""width"":36,""height"":36}},{""id"":""batteryIcon"",""component"":""Image"",""src"":{""path"":""/asset/batteryIcon""},""styles"":{""width"":16,""height"":16,""objectFit"":""contain""}},{""id"":""earphoneMeter"",""component"":""Stack"",""children"":[""earphoneRing"",""earphoneIcon""],""styles"":{""width"":36,""height"":36,""alignContent"":""center""}},{""id"":""earphoneRing"",""component"":""Progress"",""value"":{""path"":""/status/earphone/value""},""total"":{""path"":""/status/earphone/total""},""styles"":{""type"":""ring"",""color"":""#35F058"",""width"":36,""height"":36}},{""id"":""earphoneIcon"",""component"":""Image"",""src"":{""path"":""/asset/earphoneIcon""},""styles"":{""width"":17,""height"":17,""objectFit"":""contain""}},{""id"":""phoneMeter"",""component"":""Stack"",""children"":[""phoneRing"",""phoneIcon""],""styles"":{""width"":36,""height"":36,""alignContent"":""center""}},{""id"":""phoneRing"",""component"":""Progress"",""value"":{""path"":""/status/phone/value""},""total"":{""path"":""/status/phone/total""},""styles"":{""type"":""ring"",""color"":""#35F058"",""width"":36,""height"":36}},{""id"":""phoneIcon"",""component"":""Image"",""src"":{""path"":""/asset/phoneIcon""},""styles"":{""width"":17,""height"":17,""objectFit"":""contain""}},{""id"":""mainStatusRow"",""component"":""Row"",""children"":[""memoryMeter"",""memoryInfo""],""itemMargin"":8,""styles"":{""width"":""100%"",""height"":56,""justifyContent"":""start"",""alignItems"":""center""}},{""id"":""memoryMeter"",""component"":""Stack"",""children"":[""memoryRing"",""memoryIcon""],""styles"":{""width"":56,""height"":56,""alignContent"":""center""}},{""id"":""memoryRing"",""component"":""Progress"",""value"":{""path"":""/status/memory/value""},""total"":{""path"":""/status/memory/total""},""styles"":{""type"":""ring"",""color"":""#FF2AA9"",""width"":56,""height"":56}},{""id"":""memoryIcon"",""component"":""Image"",""src"":{""path"":""/asset/clearIcon""},""styles"":{""width"":28,""height"":28,""objectFit"":""contain""}},{""id"":""memoryInfo"",""component"":""Column"",""children"":[""memoryTitle"",""memoryValue""],""itemMargin"":3,""styles"":{""width"":72,""height"":54,""justifyContent"":""center"",""alignItems"":""start""}},{""id"":""memoryTitle"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/status/title""},""styles"":{""width"":72,""fontSize"":14,""minFontSize"":12,""fontWeight"":500,""fontColor"":""#DFFFFFFF"",""maxLines"":1,""textAlign"":""start""}},{""id"":""memoryValue"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/status/valueLabel""},""styles"":{""width"":72,""fontSize"":32,""minFontSize"":28,""fontWeight"":800,""fontColor"":""#FFFFFFFF"",""maxLines"":1,""textAlign"":""start""}},{""id"":""actionPill"",""component"":""Row"",""children"":[""actionIcon"",""actionLabel""],""itemMargin"":8,""onClick"":[{""call"":""clickToDeeplink"",""args"":{""bundleName"":""com.huawei.hmos.settings"",""abilityName"":""com.huawe {""version"":""v0.9"",""updateComponents"":{""surfaceId"":""spotlight-2x2-template"",""components"":[{""id"":""root"",""component"":""Column"",""children"":[""heroRow"",""contextCard"",""actionPill""],""itemMargin"":6,""styles"":{""width"":160,""height"":160,""padding"":10,""borderRadius"":20,""clip"":true,""justifyContent"":""spaceBetween"",""linearGradient"":{""direction"":""RightBottom"",""colors"":[[""#8D96A3"",0],[""#6F7A88"",0.52],[""#586373"",1]]}}},{""id"":""heroRow"",""component"":""Row"",""children"":[""visualMark"",""primaryInfo""],""itemMargin"":6,""styles"":{""width"":""100%"",""justifyContent"":""spaceBetween"",""alignItems"":""top""}},{""id"":""visualMark"",""component"":""Stack"",""children"":[""primaryIcon""],""accessibility"":{""label"":""雷阵雨图标""},""styles"":{""width"":45,""height"":45,""borderRadius"":22.5,""clip"":false,""flexShrink"":0,""alignContent"":""center""}},{""id"":""primaryIcon"",""component"":""Image"",""src"":{""path"":""/asset/primaryIcon""},""styles"":{""width"":34,""height"":34,""objectFit"":""contain"",""flexShrink"":0}},{""id"":""primaryInfo"",""component"":""Column"",""children"":[""primaryValue"",""primaryCaption""],""itemMargin"":0,""styles"":{""layoutWeight"":1,""padding"":{""top"":0,""right"":0,""bottom"":0,""left"":25},""justifyContent"":""start"",""alignItems"":""end""}},{""id"":""primaryValue"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/primary/valueLabel""},""accessibility"":{""label"":""当前温度""},""styles"":{""width"":58,""fontSize"":35,""fontWeight"":""bold"",""fontColor"":""#FFFFFFFF"",""maxLines"":1,""textOverflow"":""none"",""textAlign"":""center"",""flexShrink"":0}},{""id"":""primaryCaption"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/primary/caption""},""styles"":{""width"":58,""fontSize"":12,""fontColor"":""#D9FFFFFF"",""maxLines"":1,""textOverflow"":""none"",""textAlign"":""center"",""flexShrink"":0}},{""id"":""contextCard"",""component"":""Row"",""children"":[""accentLine"",""contextInfo""],""itemMargin"":6,""accessibility"":{""label"":""日程信息""},""styles"":{""width"":""100%"",""margin"":{""top"":5,""right"":0,""bottom"":0,""left"":0},""padding"":{""top"":5,""right"":9,""bottom"":8,""left"":9},""backgroundColor"":""#33FFFFFF"",""borderWidth"":1,""borderColor"":""#66FFFFFF"",""borderRadius"":15,""alignItems"":""center""}},{""id"":""accentLine"",""component"":""Divider"",""styles"":{""vertical"":true,""strokeWidth"":3,""color"":""#CCFFFFFF"",""height"":26}},{""id"":""contextInfo"",""component"":""Column"",""children"":[""contextTitle"",""contextMeta""],""itemMargin"":2,""styles"":{""layoutWeight"":1,""margin"":{""top"":-1,""right"":0,""bottom"":0,""left"":0},""justifyContent"":""center"",""alignItems"":""start""}},{""id"":""contextTitle"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/context/title""},""styles"":{""fontSize"":14,""fontWeight"":""bold"",""fontColor"":""#FFFFFFFF"",""maxLines"":1,""textOverflow"":""none"",""flexShrink"":0}},{""id"":""contextMeta"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/context/meta""},""styles"":{""fontSize"":12,""fontColor"":""#D9FFFFFF"",""maxLines"":1,""textOverflow"":""none"",""flexShrink"":0}},{""id"":""actionPill"",""component"":""Row"",""children"":[""actionIcon"",""actionLabel""],""itemMargin"":10,""onClick"":[{""call"":""clickToDeeplink"",""args"":{""bundleName"":""com.huawei.hmsapp.totemweather"",""abilityName"":""com.huawei.hmsapp.totemweather.MainAbility"",""uri"":""""}}],""accessibility"":{""label"":""打车去公司""},""styles"":{""width"":""100%"",""height"":32,""margin"":{""top"":4,""right"":0,""bottom"":0,""left"":0},""padding"":{""top"":0,""right"":12,""bottom"":0,""left"":12},""borderRadius"":16,""backgroundColor"":""#E60065F5"",""borderWidth"":1,""borderColor"":""#6657B7FF"",""justifyContent"":""center"",""alignItems"":""center""}},{""id"":""actionIcon"",""component"":""Image"",""src"":{""path"":""/asset/actionIcon""},""styles"":{""width"":20,""height"":20,""objectFit"":""contain"",""flexShrink"":0}},{""id"":""actionLabel"",""component"":""Text"",""content"":{""path"":""/action/label""},""styles"":{""fontSize"":14,""fontWeight"":""bold"",""fontColor"":""#FFFFFFFF"",""maxLines"":1,""textOverflow"":""none"",""textAlign"":""center"",""flexShrink"":0}}]}}
{""version"":""v0.9"",""updateDataModel"":{""surfaceId"":""spotlight-2x2-template"",""path"":""/"",""value"":{""asset"":{""primaryIcon"":""resources/base/media/icon_weathe2.png"",""actionIcon"":""resources/base/media/icon_car.png""},""primary"":{""valueLabel"":""31°"",""caption"":""Shenzhen""},""context"":{""title"":""项目阶段性汇报"",""meta"":""10:30-11:30 AM""},""action"":{""label"":""打车去公司"",""targetId"":""weather-home"",""enabled"":true}}}}"
